summary: Re-tested all three bug fixes (diagram labels, voice no-overlap, thesis section redesign) plus the requested regressions (backend test_briefings, hero parallax/scroll progress, briefing dialog flow). All 12 backend tests pass (100%). All seven Enterprise AI Stack diagrams now render the expected visible <text> labels inside their SVGs (verified via locator query [data-testid=nv-stack-module-{slug}] svg text). Voice pipeline ends at x=340 and output waveform starts at x=360 (no overlap). §01 Thesis section renders single-column headline + 3-column facet grid with all six labels and bodies + closing tagline + working 'How we build for it →' anchor link to #privacy-scale. Briefing dialog opens from nav, valid submission yields nv-briefing-success ('Received · 200 OK Thank you. Your request is logged.'). Hero scroll progress bar updates with scroll, html scroll-behavior=smooth confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: diagrams.jsx (~600 LOC) is a single file housing 7 disparate SVG components. Consider splitting per-diagram into /diagrams/*.jsx for maintainability — non-blocking.
Voice pipeline geometry: pipeline group x=148..340, output waveform x=360..460 — gap is exactly 20px. If labels grow (e.g. localised), revisit to retain margin.

ContinuousLearning.jsx facet cards use a fixed min-h-[200px]; on very small phones the body text may wrap awkwardly with the longer label 'Every customer interaction.' — visually acceptable in QA at 390px width.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates several TEST_ prefixed briefing rows in mongo briefings collection; UI test created 1 row (test_ui_submitter@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Diagram label queries should use locator('[data-testid=nv-stack-module-{slug}] svg text'). All seven slugs verified (foundation-models, intelligence-platform, ai-os, autonomous-agents, research-platform, voice-intelligence, multilingual-ai). Briefing field testids use prefix 'nv-briefing-field-*' (not 'nv-briefing-*'). Trigger testids: nv-nav-cta-briefing, nv-hero-cta-primary, nv-footer-cta-briefing. Intent select is shadcn — opening via click on trigger did not produce options in the headless run; submission still succeeded with default intent (form must default to a valid value or accept empty — main agent might want to verify default selection logic).
rca of the issue: n/a — all three previously-reported bugs are fixed and verified.
